Browser navigation collision: GET / 302s to /projects, but GET /projects with Accept: text/html answers the catalog JSON envelope, so the Projects UI shell never renders. Reproduced through startHostDashboard's real HTTP surface.

Fix verified: browser navigation loop (GET / 302 → GET /projects with text/html Accept) now serves the SPA shell through startHostDashboard, while application/json and default-Accept fetches keep the catalog envelope. Full host suite green; standalone repro transcript appended.
